## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for this repo
- [ ] My changes build locally (`npm run build` for `web`, `pytest` for `cli`, `json.load(nb)` for notebooks)

- [ ] I'm honest about what didn't work — this PR includes any caveats
- [ ] I'm okay with MIT (code) / CC-BY 4.0 (docs) licensing
